title: Market Brief — Friday, June 26, 2026
summary: GPU availability is loosening hard across every class. Util-avail sits at 32% for A100, 34% for H100, 30% for H200, and 32% for B200, all comfortably above scarcity thresholds and signaling a buyer's market. B200 spot cratered 12.5% day-over-day to $4.38/hr, the biggest single-day move on the board, while H200 volatility at 113.7% annualized screams unstable price discovery on next-gen silicon.
paragraphs: GPU availability is loosening hard across every class. Util-avail sits at 32% for A100, 34% for H100, 30% for H200, and 32% for B200, all comfortably above scarcity thresholds and signaling a buyer's market. B200 spot cratered 12.5% day-over-day to $4.38/hr, the biggest single-day move on the board, while H200 volatility at 113.7% annualized screams unstable price discovery on next-gen silicon.

DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output is selling below TCO-adjusted B200 inference cost of $4.00/M, burning cash at roughly $3.66 per million tokens on premium hardware. OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b at $0.15/M output is even more aggressive, an outright subsidy play. Grades: DeepSeek Burning Cash, OpenAI Burning Cash on oss-120b but Strong on premium o3 Pro, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral.

B200 spot at $4.38/hr is overvalued given 30-day utilization collapsing 20 percentage points to 68.1% with 63% of advertised offerings sitting idle. A100 at $1.00/hr is undervalued relative to its margin profile, the only class where medium-tier inference breaks even, making it the cleanest long for cost-sensitive Llama 70B workloads.
bullets: 30% H200 util-avail marks the tightest supply of any GPU class, yet still far from scarcity.
32% A100 util-avail reflects a 12.6 percentage point utilization drop over 30 days.
$80/M output for o3 Pro makes it 233x more expensive than DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M.
21.36 LLMflation index means token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
$3.20/M B200 inference cost is 45% cheaper than H200 at $6.55/M for Llama 70B.
63% of advertised B200 offerings sit unrented, the highest idle rate across all GPU classes.
